score_components.formula_applied: Cannot compute - this is not an FLS endoloop task

confidence_rationale: Very high confidence this is NOT an FLS Task 3 endoloop exercise. This is clearly a real laparoscopic sigmoid resection surgery with real patient anatomy, not the standardized foam appendage trainer used for FLS.
cannot_determine: FLS endoloop score - video shows real surgery, not FLS training task
Completion time for endoloop task - no endoloop was performed
Loop placement accuracy - no pre-tied loop visible
Foam appendage assessment - real colon tissue, not foam trainer
technique_summary: This video shows a competent laparoscopic sigmoid resection with proper dissection technique, tissue handling, and instrument coordination. However, it is not an FLS Task 3 endoloop exercise and cannot be scored using FLS criteria.
strengths: Good tissue handling and instrument coordination
Appropriate use of electrocautery for dissection
improvement_suggestions: For FLS scoring, this video should show the standard endoloop task with foam appendage
FLS Task 3 requires deployment of pre-tied ligating loop, not surgical resection
